---
title: "Infectious Disease Schedule"
output: 
  html_document
---

| Week | Date | Module      |    Topic                                                              | Activity     | Readings                                                                                                                                                             | Assignments                                                                                              | Misc.                                                                                                |
|:----:|:----:|-------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------|--------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| 01   | 03 F | Coronavirus | Introduction                                                          |              |                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                          |                                                                                                      |
|      | 05 F |             | Coronavirus: article discussion                                       |              |                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                          |                                                                                                      |
| 02   | 10 F |             | Coronavirus: investigations                                           |              |                                                                                                                                                                      | [nCoV investigation](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1kugQCxfKDr-wLR1DnEAA5BB1Eda6Nu5z/view?usp=sharing) |                                                                                                      |
|      | 12 F |             | Coronavirus: paper discussion of the 1918 flu                         |              | [1918 flu pandemic](https://www.pnas.org/content/pnas/104/18/7582.full.pdf)                                                                                          |                                                                                                          |                                                                                                      |
|      | 14 F |             | Coronavirus: investigations                                           |              |                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                          |                                                                                                      |
| 03   | 17 F | Dynamics    | Simple epidemic models: introduction                                  |              |                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                          |                                                                                                      |
|      | 19 F |             | Simple epidemic models                                                |              | [Modeling HIV](http://assets.press.princeton.edu/chapters/s8458.pdf)                                                                                                 |                                                                                                          | [SIR model in R](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1naof3LYjfkeHl9kbM-hHGgNcmRsla0CN/view?usp=sharing) |
|      | 21 F |             | Simple epidemic models in R                                           |              |                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                          | [Phillips HIV model](https://www.jstor.org/stable/pdf/2890152.pdf)                                   |
| 04   | 24 F |             | Simple epidemic models in R, pt. II                                   |              | [Clim change and zoonoses](https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/2020.01.24.918755v1), [Global div of parasites](https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/815902v2) |                                                                                                          |                                                                                                      |
|      | 26 F |             | Climate change and zoonotic disease and Global diversity of parasites |              |                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                          |                                                                                                      |
|      | 28 F |             | Invited guest                                                         |              |                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                          |                                                                                                      |
| 05   | 02 M |             | Spatial dynamics; controlling spread                                  | Case studies |                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                          |                                                                                                      |
|      | 06 M |             |                                                                       | Case studies |                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                          |                                                                                                      |
| 06   | 09 M |             | Controlling spread; population genetics                               |              |                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                          |                                                                                                      |
|      | 13 M |             |                                                                       | Case studies |                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                          |                                                                                                      |
| 07   | 16 M | Evolution   | Antibiotic resistance; evolution of virulence                         |              |                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                          |                                                                                                      |
|      | 20 M |             |                                                                       | Case studies |                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                          |                                                                                                      |
|      | 23 M |             | **Break**                                                             |              |                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                          |                                                                                                      |
| 08   | 30 M |             | Coevolution; cospeciation                                             |              |                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                          |                                                                                                      |
|      | 03 A |             |                                                                       | Case studies |                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                          |                                                                                                      |
| 09   | 06 A | Ecology     | Interactions between parasites within hosts                           |              |                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                          |                                                                                                      |
|      | 10 A |             |                                                                       | Case studies |                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                          |                                                                                                      |
| 10   | 13 A |             | Parasite and host diversity                                           |              |                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                          |                                                                                                      |
|      | 17 A |             | **No class; Chris at a meeting**                                      |              |                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                          |                                                                                                      |
| 11   | 20 A |             | Regulation of hosts by pathogens                                      |              |                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                          |                                                                                                      |
|      | 24 A |             |                                                                       | Case studies |                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                          |                                                                                                      |
| 12   | 27 A |             | Pathogens and communities                                             |              |                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                          |                                                                                                      |
|      | 01 M |             |                                                                       | Case studies |                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                          |                                                                                                      |
| 13   | 04 M |             | Pathogens and ecosystems                                              |              |                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                          |                                                                                                      |
| Exam | xx M |             |                                                                       |              |                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                          |                                                                                                      |
